speakers.name: Alex
speakers.reason: Facilitates the meeting, agrees with suggestions, and proactively takes on an action item.

speakers.name: Sarah
speakers.reason: Identifies a critical issue, proposes a clear solution, and takes ownership of a key action item.

timeline.summary: Alex initiates the meeting, and Sarah immediately highlights a budget concern and proposes a direct solution.
Alex quickly agrees with Sarah's proposed solution to freeze subscriptions, moving the conversation forward efficiently.
Both speakers proactively assign themselves clear action items, demonstrating a productive and decisive conclusion.
